# PERF-195 positive: log.Fatal in a goroutine
lang: go
file: PERF-195-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"log"
	"net/http"
)

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	_ = w
	_ = r
	go func() {
		if err := connect(); err != nil {
			log.Fatal(err)
		}
	}()
}

func connect() error { return nil }
